meta.title: PCN-101 — Security Systems
meta.description: PCN-101 — installation and maintenance of fire alarm systems, video surveillance, APS monitoring, design documentation and evacuation plans.

hero.text: PCN-101 provides professional fire alarm and video surveillance installation, APS monitoring with dispatch center integration. Full cycle: from design to audit.

services.title: Full range of security services
services.desc: We protect facilities of any complexity — from installation to regular maintenance and audit.

fireAlarm.title: Fire alarm systems
fireAlarm.text: Installation and maintenance of automatic fire alarm systems (APS) in compliance with regulations and supervisory authority requirements.

monitoring.title: APS monitoring
monitoring.text: 24/7 monitoring of automatic fire alarm systems with signal transmission to the emergency dispatch center.

video.title: Video surveillance
video.text: Design, installation and maintenance of video surveillance systems for commercial and industrial facilities.

psd.title: Design documentation
psd.text: Project and estimate documentation, evacuation plans and equipment layout schemes for regulatory approval.

audit.title: Fire safety audit
audit.text: Comprehensive assessment of fire safety conditions, identification of violations and remediation recommendations.

maintenance.title: Technical maintenance
maintenance.text: Regular maintenance of all installed systems — ensuring uninterrupted operation and regulatory compliance.

about.title: PCN-101 — a reliable security partner
about.text1: We specialize in comprehensive fire safety and video monitoring for business centers, warehouses, manufacturing plants and residential complexes.
about.text2: Our engineering team delivers turnkey solutions: from design documentation and equipment installation to dispatch center integration and ongoing maintenance.
about.list1: Work in accordance with current standards and regulations

advantages.title: Benefits of working with PCN-101
advantages.item1Text: All security services — one company, one contract, single point of responsibility.
advantages.item2Text: Detailed project estimates with no hidden fees or unexpected surcharges.
advantages.item3Text: Round-the-clock system control with instant signal transmission to the dispatch center.
advantages.item4Text: Engineers with specialized education and years of experience on projects of any complexity.

process.title: Stages of cooperation
process.step1Text: We discuss your needs and visit the site for an initial inspection.
process.step2Text: We develop design documentation, evacuation plans and technical solutions.
process.step3Text: We install equipment, configure and test all systems.
process.step4Text: We connect monitoring and provide regular maintenance and support.

contact.title: Ready to discuss your project?
contact.text: Submit a request — we will contact you within one business day with a tailored proposal.
contact.mapValue: Republic of Kazakhstan, Pavlodar city, Toraygirva street, 79/1 Respect Building, office 1
contact.formNote: By clicking the button, you agree to the processing of personal data
contact.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
contact.toast: Request sent! We will contact you shortly.

footer.desc: Installation and maintenance of security systems
